title: be going to (do)
desc: 계획된 의도 또는 근거 있는 예측
examples: >> Nobody's here. We actually rented the park out today, so just me, you know, private experience. Just kidding. We need a lot more money for that. It's starting to rain pretty hard. Just my luck. How did the weather say 100% sunshine? And now we get this. I guess the clouds add to the spooky vibe. Let's stay positive. Is it a trip to Lay World if you don't rent a school uniform? I don't think so. Of course you are. We have to match. Look at the bloody uniforms. I know for a lot of Koreans this is very nostalgic, but for me it reminds me of Britney Spears, the hit me baby one more time video. She dresses in a school uniform. Very iconic. I feel like my biceps are going to bust out of this uniform. I got to take it easy on the protein. The sizes are stressing me out. It's either too small or too big.

I got bit by a vampire. I think it looks really good, but it was a little bit of a ripoff. I didn't realize they were only putting on temporary tattoos. I thought they were going to paint our faces. [music] It was done in 1 second.
Rip off. I'm going to ride the giant digger. I love big fast roller coasters.

Let's win some prizes. I'm [music] scoping out the claw machines. I always go for Toothless because he's my favorite. But tonight, I want to try something else. I'm going to try to win Shrek tonight. I'm not very good at claw machines, but I have a good feeling.
>> Timu. [laughter] >> Okay, I'm holding you to it. Everybody, you are my witness. Hong is going to buy me a little Shrek from Timu. Okay, let's play games.

title: will / shall
examples: [laughter] Bra. Hell no. Happy Halloween. I'm at Lay World in Busousan to celebrate. I checked the weather forecast this morning and it said it's supposed to be sunny today, but it's been raining on and off all morning.

>> We'll see. I haven't tried it yet.
